feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Need another show like this
entry.content: Just finished watching the last season today after going through the entire series while my wife was out of town for the week. I felt very melancholy as I was finishing the last finale. Any other shows like this even come close to its wit, charm or smarts? It was so far ahead of its time for exploring the space it did making it more relevant than when it finished

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Remember when things didn't need constant updates? When software just worked out…
entry.content: Remember when things didn't need constant updates? When software just worked out of the box? I miss that.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is it really worth it to miss out on the biggest cultural event in gaming histor…
entry.content: Is it really worth it to miss out on the biggest cultural event in gaming history just to be a contrarian? People are talking about refinancing their home just so they can buy the game and a console to play it on, which may sound a bit absurd, but it's totally understandable

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: While this film was a critical and financial failure in its initial release in t…
entry.content: While this film was a critical and financial failure in its initial release in theaters, it made more than triple the cost of production in DVD and post-theater sales. Statistically, It is one of the most successful 'Friday the 13th' films. Despite initial negative critical feedback, over time it has become more popular among younger fans of the franchise, mainly for its self-deprecating humor and inventive death scenes.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Howdy doo there gentlemen. Happy 4th to you all and to all a good 4th. May I inq…
entry.content: Howdy doo there gentlemen. Happy 4th to you all and to all a good 4th. May I inquire how everyone's celebrating this fine day? For me, I like to sit down and play a fresh save from some newly purchased Skyrim. Why, I make a new account and purchase it every year. It's mightily refreshing and on par with the holiday.

entry.title: /b/ Random: She is my girlfriend. I have photos of her at Christmas—with her parents, sister…
entry.content: She is my girlfriend. I have photos of her at Christmas—with her parents, sister, and extended family, and with her ex-boyfriend—as well as photos from her workplace, inside her home, and of her personal documents, and, of course, naked.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Bitlocker protected a partition on my SSD. It is PIN protected and not recovery …
entry.content: Bitlocker protected a partition on my SSD. It is PIN protected and not recovery phrase protected, so yellowKey doesnt work here. BIOS is also password protected. TPM is on. Every log out forces a dismount and relocking of this partition. On this partition I have my entire life. Can the glowniggers or tech-savy stalkers still crack it open?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Commodore Callback/Commodore 64 Phone
entry.content: >dumbphone with admittedly cool aesthetics >blocks all social media (not incapable of running it, just blocks it) >has snake >can't scan qr codes >just phone and snake >500$ What the fuck were they thinking? No minimalist would pay 500$, and it's an extremely niche product. You could be minimalist with basic tools and no slop on any android. You can also just buy a new flipphone today at dollar general for 20$. I think my 2023 flipphone would be incapable of running most social media as well. I

entry.title: /int/ International: The only time I've ever been happy was in Europe...
entry.content: ...while traveling in hostels. I did it each Summer while in college. It was the only time women were into me. It was the only time I was socially successful. It was the only time I wasn't stressed or depressed. How much is living in Europe like traveling in hostels in Europe? Because if its even somewhat close then I'm moving. I can no longer live in a country where the women and people find me unlikeable or unattractive.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I am seated in an office, surrounded by heads and bodies. My posture is consciou…
entry.content: I am seated in an office, surrounded by heads and bodies. My posture is consciously congruent to the shape of my hard chair. This is a cold room. They are all watching me. I sit in my posture and I am not a tennis player. I am an academic. Or, rather, I am an academic-to-be. I am a student of the literary, the historical, the political, the linguistic. I am a scholar. My skin is the color of the pages of a book, a pale, translucent, parchment white. I am seventeen. I am currently enrolled at the

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is having 8 insurance claims/accidents common or bad?
entry.content: Tell me straight - because I honestly don't know, I don't have many friends and talk rarely to my parents. I live in Vancouver, acquired my full driver's license in 2023. Since then, I've been involved in 8 separate accidents, 6 of which I was deemed 100% at fault for, by ICBC (Insurance Corporation of British Columbia). My buddy who lives in Toronto came visiting Vancouver, we met today for lunch, both of us got our license at the same time - he burst out laughing at me when he learnt this. I f

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: It's kind of weird how you can have tv shows that are insanely popular and influ…

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Young Glaswegians extolled by those weary of verse-chorus-verse as "radical," "b…
entry.content: Young Glaswegians extolled by those weary of verse-chorus-verse as "radical," "beautiful," and other things that would never occur to the rest of us, they mutate the forgettable mess of their debut into something altogether more deliberate and kempt-occasionally tuneful, invariably slow. Only on the oceanbound land mass where acid house was Beatlemania would anyone sit still for such earnest post-rock tripe. C

entry.title: /int/ International: Facts about Brazil
entry.content: Half of all slaves imported from Africa went to Brazil. Over 53% of the Brazilian population were slaves at the institution's peak. In Brazil, racemixing with slaves was so common that many slavemasters would allow their mating bucks to breed their wives and raise the children as culturally white. Brazil did not abolish slavery until 1888. Many slaves were sad and refused to leave the plantations because they had developed long-term sexual relationships with their master's daughters and wives. A

entry.title: /int/ International: Pakistan
entry.content: Hello, First of all, I am not Pakistani. I have been researching this country; and it sounds like they give out free citizenship if you have a UK passport. Second, I have do not understand the crore and lakh system; but I believe these homes on facebook market place are very cheap. Lets say I bought a $50,000 mansion; could I just hire young female servants and live like huge heffner? It is Pakistan, so i imagine a lot of very young women are very very poor, and I can have up to four wifes; and

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hank Williams Jr.: Family Tradition [Elektra, 1979] Since "To Love Somebody" isn…
entry.content: Hank Williams Jr.: Family Tradition [Elektra, 1979] Since "To Love Somebody" isn't exactly Hank's kind of song, I guess he disavowed the Ray Ruff-produced side of this. On the other hand, "Family Tradition" (guess who that's about) leads off the other side, and it is exactly Hank's kind of song. Exactly. That's not so great either. C

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If you think you're having a bad day, let me tell you about mine. My 19 year old…
entry.content: If you think you're having a bad day, let me tell you about mine. My 19 year old sugar baby (I'm 32, by the way) just dropped the news that she's pregnant, right after our vacation trip to Cancun. If this girl ends up being the mother of my kid, I'm absolutely screwed. My parents are going to lose it if I tell them their ugly bastard looking incel son knocked up some teenage gold digger. Inb4 "DNA test" That's the kicker, she's the one who suggested it before I said anything in case I had doubts

entry.content: I am God. I am from Buffalo New York but live in a town in Rhode Island. My half sister is Jewish. My fiance is called Angie. I am currently a patient at Pilgrim State Hospital, Long Island City. I involuntarily created this reality when my psyche shattered. That was the big bang. I am God and the Devil and you are all pieces of the angel. This existence is my exile, when I wake up from this place all of you will cease to exist. Until I get home I am not anyone. Here I come. Thank you for your a
